misc.text: un manga: 10€ un libro: 25€ un juego: 60€ un concierto: +100€ pero el problema es la pirateria Joan-sama (@Joan_NGNL) Ver gente que dice que no tiene dinero para comprar mangas, pero luego en un año se han comprado 3 videojuegos triple A, se han ido a 4 conciertos y cada mes semanas salen a cenar... Amigo, no es que no tengas dinero, es que el que tienes no quieres destinarlo al manga. — https://nitter.net/Joan_NGNL/status/2047963631229296685#m

misc.title: #BERSERK #ベルセルク
misc.text: #BERSERK #ベルセルク

misc.title: Hot take: If you hate Griffith but glorify Guts, you missed the entire point of #BERSERK #ベルセルク. One built a kingdom, the other just survived—guess which one actually changed the world.
misc.text: Hot take: If you hate Griffith but glorify Guts, you missed the entire point of #BERSERK #ベルセルク. One built a kingdom, the other just survived—guess which one actually changed the world.

misc.title: Griffith did NOTHING wrong. If you think he’s a villain, you’re either clueless or too soft to grasp what ambition actually costs. Griffith played the game better than anyone—cry about it.
misc.text: Griffith did NOTHING wrong. If you think he’s a villain, you’re either clueless or too soft to grasp what ambition actually costs. Griffith played the game better than anyone—cry about it.
